nasb.text: When they came to Jesus, they earnestly implored Him, saying, “He is worthy for You to grant this to him;

esv.text: And when they came to Jesus, they pleaded with him earnestly, saying, “He is worthy to have you do this for him,

cnv.text: 長老們就來見耶穌，懇切地求他說：“你給他行這事，是他配得的，

ccb.text: 他们便来恳求耶稣，说：“这位百夫长值得你帮助，

csbs.text: 他们来到耶稣那里，殷切地求他说：“这人配得你的帮助，
